title: Powering Up Protection:
body:
Powering Up Protection:
Electric & Hybrid Vehicles' Impact on Insurance

Electric and hybrid vehicles are reshaping the road and the risks you must manage. Take an in-depth look at the challenges these vehicles pose, including lithium-ion battery hazards, repair complexities, and theft trends. Discover how regulatory changes, environmental risks, and evolving technologies like autonomous features are affecting the insurance landscape. The session also highlights innovations in claims processing, underwriting, and repair training that are helping the industry adapt. Equip yourself with knowledge to better serve clients in this fast-evolving market.

Pricing

Webinar Details

Powering Up Protection: Electric & Hybrid Vehicles' Impact on Insurance

Navigate the unique challenges of insuring electric and hybrid vehicles. Learn how evolving vehicle technology impacts claims, underwriting, and risk assessment. Gain insights into industry innovations and solutions that help both agents and adjusters adapt to rising exposures from battery fires to repair costs and environmental liabilities.

Topics

  • Explore the rising risks associated with lithium-ion batteries, Advanced Driver Assistance Systems (ADAS), and repair complexity
  • Examine theft trends, environmental exposures, and regulatory challenges
  • Evaluate how AI, advanced repair tech, and underwriting models are adapting
  • Identify solutions like collision repair education and claims automation
  • Apply new knowledge to better guide clients and assess modern vehicle exposures
